creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

This submissions references a version of imap-uw that 
no longer exists on the distribution site.  I'm also not 
convinced that this really needs to be a port by itself, 
perhaps you can work with the maintainer of mail/imap-uw 
to have this functionality brought in with a compile-time 
knob in the Makefile, say USE_MAILDIR=YES ?
